task: Drive remaining CLAUDE.md expanded KG checklist items to validated completion with bounded scratch-first work.

tasks.subject: Docs: canonical KG state
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md to reflect the promoted biosample/expression GCS state, coverage counts, and remaining missing checklist items.
tasks.result: CLAUDE.md updated for promoted biosample/expression GCS state: 8/15 node files, 23/77 edge files, 3,199,166 nodes, 24,940,044 edges, zero dangling edges; cell_type and expression relations removed from missing lists.

tasks.subject: Next KG slice selection
tasks.description: Choose the next highest-leverage CLAUDE.md checklist item after biosample/expression, prefer small bounded scratch-first sources, and avoid final TxGNN model testing until KG slices are validated.
tasks.result: Selected and merged OpenTargets disease_phenotype after patching MONDO/HP normalization and endpoint stubs. Promoted disease, phenotype, and disease_has_phenotype Parquets to GCS. Final GCS validate PASS: 3,203,188 nodes, 25,030,503 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.

tasks.subject: Final TxGNN tiny smoke constraints
tasks.description: Design the final TxGNN model smoke test to run on VPS with at most 2 CPU and 4G RAM using a tiny model and explicit systemd resource limits.
tasks.result: CLAUDE.md Phase 9 now specifies final TxGNN model smoke constraints: tiny model, systemd CPUQuota=200%, MemoryMax=4G, local/scratch data only, no production GCS mutation, pressure treated as blocker.

tasks.subject: Merge OpenTargets pharmacogenomics
tasks.description: Add mutation stubs and mutation_affects_molecule_response from OpenTargets pharmacogenomics using scratch-first GCS copy, validate zero dangling edges, then promote only if validated.
tasks.result: Merged OpenTargets pharmacogenomics. Promoted nodes/mutation.parquet, updated nodes/molecule.parquet, and edges/mutation_affects_molecule_response.parquet. GCS validate PASS: 3,205,619 nodes, 25,035,369 edges, total_dangling_edges=0. Coverage now 9/15 node files and 24/77 edge files.

tasks.subject: Merge OpenTargets drug_molecule
tasks.description: Merge cached OpenTargets drug_molecule into molecule nodes using scratch-first local KG copy, validate zero dangling edges, then promote if validated.
tasks.result: Merged cached OpenTargets drug_molecule into nodes/molecule.parquet. Added/enriched 22,230 ChEMBL records with drug_type/is_approved/inchikey/smiles and 19,100 DrugBank IDs; row count remains 31,007 because endpoints already existed. GCS validate PASS: 3,205,619 nodes, 25,035,369 edges, total_dangling_edges=0, peak RSS about 6.2G.

tasks.subject: Stage and merge OpenTargets target+GO
tasks.description: Download/stage OpenTargets target and go in scratch, merge gene GO pathway nodes/edges, validate zero dangling edges, and promote only if validation passes.
tasks.error: GO scratch ingest still too slow after schema/chunking fix; stopped before validation/promotion

tasks.subject: Recover OpenTargets GO merge
tasks.description: Profile and fix the target+GO scratch ingest performance regression, then rerun scratch validation and promote only if validated.
tasks.result: Recovered and merged OpenTargets target+GO. Optimized dedup_edges fast path for no-evidence edge tables; pathway_contains_gene write dropped from stuck CPU loop to 8.6s. Promoted nodes/gene.parquet, nodes/pathway.parquet, and edges/pathway_contains_gene.parquet. GCS validate PASS: 3,233,849 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0, peak RSS about 6.3G.

tasks.subject: Select next post-GO KG slice
tasks.description: Choose and start the next CLAUDE.md checklist slice after target+GO, preferring bounded scratch-first work and avoiding known semantic endpoint mismatches.
tasks.result: Selected next safe work item after target+GO: resolve legacy protein endpoint conflation before running interaction/MoA/protein-node exports. Current GCS protein-named relations use gene endpoints, so blindly ingesting interaction would compound semantic mismatch.

tasks.subject: Resolve legacy protein endpoint conflation
tasks.description: Audit protein-named GCS edge files that currently use gene endpoints, update CLAUDE.md/schema notes, and decide the safe path before interaction/MoA/protein node exports.
tasks.result: Audited all protein-named GCS edge files. They physically use gene endpoints: protein_interacts_protein gene→gene, and molecule_targets_protein/disease_associated_protein/pathway_contains_protein/tissue_expresses_protein/phenotype_associated_protein y_type=gene. Updated CLAUDE.md to mark them as legacy gene/protein-conflated relations and to block blind interaction/MoA ingestion until protein node/remapping is handled.

tasks.subject: Plan protein node export path
tasks.description: Use current OpenTargets target data and legacy gene/protein mappings to decide the safest path for nodes/protein.parquet and protein remapping before interaction/MoA exports.
tasks.result: Applied Jérémie's schema decision: protein primary IDs are Ensembl Protein ENSP, not UniProt. Updated manage_db/kg_schema.py NodeType.PROTEIN primary ontology/id_format/example/xrefs and CLAUDE.md node schema/protein-conflation note. Tests passed: tests/test_kg_storage.py and tests/test_credibility.py.

tasks.subject: Implement ENSP protein node export
tasks.description: Use OpenTargets target data to build/stage nodes/protein.parquet with ENSP primary IDs and gene/UniProt xrefs, then validate scratch before GCS promotion.
tasks.result: Implemented ENSP protein node export from OpenTargets target.transcripts.translationId. Promoted nodes/protein.parquet with 233,995 ENSP protein nodes and UniProt/gene xrefs. GCS validate PASS: 10 node types, 24 edge types, 3,467,844 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0, peak RSS about 6.5G.

tasks.subject: Plan ENSP protein edge remapping
tasks.description: Use protein node ensembl_gene_id/uniprot_id xrefs to decide and implement safe remapping for legacy protein-named edges from gene endpoints to ENSP endpoints where unambiguous.
